sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n18446" key="a)fo/rasis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀφόρ-ᾱσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n18446.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">looking away,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἡ εἰς τὸ πλῆθος ἀ.</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg007:p.251C" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Alc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.251C.</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> </sense> </entryFree>
